revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「賀茂波爾神社（かもはにじんじゃ）は京都府京都市左京区にある神社。 赤い鳥居から赤の宮とも呼ばれる」
revision.text: 賀茂波爾神社（かもはにじんじゃ）は京都府京都市左京区にある神社。 赤い鳥居から赤の宮とも呼ばれる

revision.comment: 内容追加
revision.text: 賀茂波爾神社（かもはにじんじゃ）は京都府京都市左京区にある神社。賀茂御祖神社の境外摂社 赤い鳥居から赤の宮神社とも呼ばれる。 ==祭神== *波爾安日子神 *波爾安日女神

revision.comment: -sd。リダイレクトにしました。
revision.text: #転送[[賀茂御祖神社#摂社]]

{{nihongo|'''Kamohara Shrine'''|賀茂波爾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamohara Shrine'''|賀茂波爾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamohara Shrine'''|賀茂波爾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Kamohara Shrine'''|賀茂波爾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamohara Shrine'''|賀茂波爾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

It is a subshrine of {{ill|Shimogamo Shrine|lt=Shimogamo Shrine|ca|Santuari de Shimogamo|en|Shimogamo Shrine|eo|Sanktejo Ŝimogamo|es|Santuario Shimogamo|eu|Shimogamo santutegia|fa|معبد شیموگامو|fi|Shimogamo-jinja|fr|Shimogamo-jinja (Kyoto)|id|Kuil Shimogamo|ja|賀茂御祖神社|ko|가모미오야 신사|la|Templum Simogamo|my|ရှိမိုဂမိုနတ်ကျောင်း|pl|Shimogamo-jinja|pt|Kamomioya-jinja|ru|Симогамо-дзиндзя|simple|Shimogamo Shrine|sl|Svetišče Šimogamo|th|ศาลเจ้าชิโมงาโมะ|tr|Shimogamo Tapınağı|zh|賀茂御祖神社|WD=Q701620}} and it has its own subshrine, an Inari Shrine. There is little more information available on it.

It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].<ref name=":0" /> It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for {{ill|Q135038775|ltq=Q135038775|WD=Q135038775|1=Kamonohanino Shrine}}.<ref name=":0" /> With the alternative candidate being {{ill|Hajio Shrine (Otagi district)|lt=Hajio Shrine (Otagi district)|WD=Q135068695|1=Hajio Shrine (Otagi district)}}.<ref name=":0" />
